title: the place/time/reason + where/when/why + S + V

formulas.zh: 名詞（地點/時間/原因）+ 關係副詞（where/when/why）+ 主詞 + 動詞
名詞（地點/時間/原因）+ 介系詞 + which + 主詞 + 動詞（改寫形式）

explanation: 關係副詞 where、when、why 引導形容詞子句，修飾先行詞為地點、時間或原因的名詞。where 修飾地點、when 修飾時間、why 修飾原因，子句提供額外資訊。此句型可改寫為「介系詞 + which」的形式：where = in/at + which；when = in/during + which；why = for which。掌握先行詞性質是關鍵，避免混淆關係代名詞與關係副詞用法。

examples.eng: This is the museum where we saw the ancient artifacts last month.
examples.chi: 這是我們上個月看到古代文物的博物館。

examples.eng: The summer when I traveled to Japan was unforgettable and exciting.
examples.chi: 我去日本旅遊的那個夏天是難忘且令人興奮的。

examples.eng: The main reason why she quit her job was the lack of work-life balance.
examples.chi: 她辭去工作的主要原因是缺乏工作與生活的平衡。

examples.eng: This is the restaurant where I had my first date, which holds special memories.
examples.chi: 這是我第一次約會的餐廳，它承載著特殊的回憶。

extension.tip: 區分關係副詞與關係代名詞：where/when/why 引導子句修飾名詞時，先行詞是地點/時間/原因；若先行詞是人或物，應使用 who/that/which。判斷法：先行詞可代入「介系詞 + which」時，使用關係副詞。

examples.test: ✗ The place which we visited was beautiful. / ✓ The place where we visited was beautiful.
examples.result: → 先行詞 place 是地點，應用 where 而非 which，或用 that/which + 完整動詞短語

examples.test: ✓ The year when he was born was 1995. / ✓ The year in which he was born was 1995.
examples.result: → when 可改寫為 in which；兩種用法均正確

examples.test: ✓ The reason why she left was unclear. / ✓ The reason for which she left was unclear.
examples.result: → why 可改寫為 for which；正式文章多用 for which

extension.note: 記住三個關係副詞：where（地點）、when（時間）、why（原因），可全部改寫為「介系詞 + which」形式。

parts: I spent my childhood is now being renovated.
exercises.sentence: The school where I spent my childhood is now being renovated.
exercises.translation: 我度過童年的那所學校現在正在整修。

parts: we first met was the beginning of our friendship.
exercises.sentence: The day when we first met was the beginning of our friendship.
exercises.translation: 我們初次相識的那天是友誼的開始。

parts: he refused such an excellent opportunity.
exercises.sentence: I cannot understand the reason why he refused such an excellent opportunity.
exercises.translation: 我無法理解他拒絕這麼好的機會的原因。

parts: the meeting took place was too crowded and uncomfortable.
exercises.sentence: The conference room where the meeting took place was too crowded and uncomfortable.
exercises.translation: 會議舉行的會議室太擁擠且不舒適。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的關係副詞填空，修飾表地點的先行詞。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The library _______ we studied yesterday has a large collection of science books.
mc_exercises.explanation: 先行詞 "the library" 是地點名詞，應使用關係副詞 "where" 引導形容詞子句。"when" 用於時間先行詞，"why" 用於原因先行詞，"which" 是關係代名詞，需搭配介系詞或直接當受詞。此句 "where" 可改寫為 "in which we studied"。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係副詞，修飾時間名詞先行詞。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The winter _______ we experienced heavy snowfall was the coldest in twenty years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 先行詞 "the winter" 是時間名詞，應使用關係副詞 "when" 引導形容詞子句。"where" 修飾地點，"that" 雖可用於非限定用法但此處不如 "when" 適當，"in which" 是介系詞+關係代名詞的形式，文法上也對但用法較正式。"when" 是最自然的選擇。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 識別正確的關係副詞用法，修飾原因名詞。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The reason _______ he quit his job was that he wanted to pursue his dream of becoming a musician.
mc_exercises.explanation: 先行詞 "the reason" 是原因名詞，應使用關係副詞 "why" 引導形容詞子句。"that" 作為關係代名詞不適用於原因先行詞，"because" 是從屬連接詞不能作關係副詞，"which" 是關係代名詞，需搭配介系詞 "for" 才能表達原因。"why" 可改寫為 "for which"。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據先行詞性質選擇適當的關係副詞或介系詞+關係代名詞形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The conference room _______ we held the important meeting last Monday was recently renovated and equipped with the latest technology.
mc_exercises.explanation: 先行詞 "the conference room" 是地點名詞，使用關係副詞 "where" 最自然簡潔。"when" 用於時間先行詞錯誤，"at which" 與 "in which" 文法上可接受（改寫形式），但 "where" 是最標準簡潔的表達。雖然 "in which" 也對，但題目選擇中 "where" 是最佳答案。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 圖書館是我最喜歡讀書的地方。
translation_exercises.answer: The library is the place where I like to read books most.
hints: 句型框架：the place + where + S + V，where 修飾表示地點的名詞
常見錯誤：勿用 which 代替 where；避免用 'the place which I like to read'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 聯考是學生最緊張的時刻，在那個時候每個人都會全力準備。
translation_exercises.answer: The college entrance exam is the time when students feel most nervous, and during that moment everyone prepares with full effort.
hints: 句型框架：the time + when + S + V，when 修飾表示時間的名詞
易混淆點：時間用 when 而非 which；不可寫成 'the time which students feel nervous'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我不能理解他遲到的原因，那是他不尊重別人的表現。
translation_exercises.answer: I cannot understand the reason why he was late, which was a sign of his disrespect for others.
hints: 句型框架：the reason + why + S + V，why 修飾表示原因的名詞
注意：可改寫為 'the reason for which he was late'；避免寫成 'the reason that/which he was late'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 高中最充實的三年正是我打下基礎的時期，在那段時光裡我學會了如何獨立思考和解決問題。
translation_exercises.answer: The three years of high school, which were the most fulfilling period when I laid a strong foundation, was the time during which I learned how to think independently and solve problems.
key_points: 時間關係副詞與介系詞+which的轉換
hints: 句型框架：可用 'the time when S + V' 或 'the time during which S + V'，兩者意義相同
進階技巧：掌握 where = in/at + which、when = in/during + which、why = for which 的互換關係，增加表達多樣性
